configurations.name: Python 3.11 - uv/pip - Streamable-HTTP

commands.install:
v=3.11.9
# Pyenv mirror (Huawei Cloud):
mkdir -p ~/.pyenv/cache/
wget -nc https://mirrors.huaweicloud.com/python/$v/Python-$v.tar.xz -P ~/.pyenv/cache/
# uv mirror (Aliyun):
export UV_PYPI_MIRROR=https://mirrors.aliyun.com/pypi/simple/

cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/
pyenv install -s $v
pyenv local $v
uv venv
source .venv/bin/activate
uv pip install -r requirements.txt

configurations.description: Python 3.11 极速环境 (uv) - Streamable-HTTP 模式: 适用于追求极致性能的 Web 服务。使用 Rust 编写的 uv 工具和高效的 HTTP 流式传输。
configurations.description_en: Python 3.11 High Performance (uv) - Streamable-HTTP: For fastest setup and efficient HTTP streaming.

configurations.name: Python 3.10 - Global/pip - Stdio

commands.install:
v=3.10.14
# Pyenv mirror (Huawei Cloud):
mkdir -p ~/.pyenv/cache/
wget -nc https://mirrors.huaweicloud.com/python/$v/Python-$v.tar.xz -P ~/.pyenv/cache/
# pip mirror (Aliyun):
pip config set global.index-url https://mirrors.aliyun.com/pypi/simple/

cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/
pyenv install -s $v
pyenv local $v
pip install -r requirements.txt
echo 'Dependency installation complete. Config is managed by meta.'

configurations.description: Python 3.10 全局环境 - Stdio 模式: 适用于 Docker 容器或一次性 CI 环境。直接安装到系统路径，无虚拟环境隔离。
configurations.description_en: Python 3.10 Global - Stdio: For Docker/CI. Installs directly to system path.

configurations.name: Node.js 20 - npm - SSE

commands.install:
# npm mirror (Aliyun):
# npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com

source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh
nvm install 20
nvm use 20
cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/
npm install
commands.start: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && npm start -- --transport=sse --port=8080

configurations.description: Node.js 20 LTS (npm) - SSE 模式: 推荐用于生产环境 Web 服务。使用 NVM 切换版本，npm 管理依赖。
configurations.description_en: Node.js 20 LTS (npm) - SSE: Recommended for production web services. Uses NVM and npm.

configurations.name: Node.js 20 - npm - Stdio

args: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && exec node index.js --transport=stdio

commands.install:
# npm mirror (Aliyun):
# npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com

source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh
nvm install 20
nvm use 20
cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/
npm install
echo 'Dependency installation complete. Config is managed by meta.'

configurations.description: Node.js 20 LTS (npm) - Stdio 模式: 适用于 MCP 客户端集成。直接使用 node 运行以避免 npm 输出干扰标准流。
configurations.description_en: Node.js 20 LTS (npm) - Stdio: For MCP client integration. Runs directly with node to avoid npm noise.

configurations.name: Node.js 22 - pnpm - SSE

commands.install:
# npm mirror (Aliyun):
# npm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com
# pnpm mirror (Aliyun):
# pnpm config set registry https://registry.npmmirror.com

source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh
nvm install 22
nvm use 22
cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/
pnpm install
commands.start: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pnpm start -- --transport=sse --port=8080

configurations.description: Node.js 22 Latest (pnpm) - SSE 模式: 适用于尝鲜和高性能 Web 构建。pnpm 节省磁盘空间并加快安装速度。

configurations.name: Shell - Custom Script - SSE
